case_title: BALWANT D THAKOR VS. SAILOR SINELLI ARMSTRONG

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D AS TO DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, SAILOR SINELLI SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $230.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, SAILOR SINELLI

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, SAILOR SINELLI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 481 MINNA ST. #222, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103-2914, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (AMENDED COURT JUDGMENT FILED 6/1/09)

REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $370.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (FOR COURT JUDGMENT) AS TO DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, SAILOR SINELLI

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, SAILOR SINELLI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES RETURNED TO THE PLAINTIFF ON 1/14/09. $2,550.00 RENT, $370.00 COSTS, $1,439.76 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,359.76, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
